messages.content: Clean and normalize the employee dataset, then summarize the results

content.name: DataTransformerAgent
content.description: Transform and clean datasets for analytics

content.delta:
Please provide the employee dataset you’d like cleaned and normalized.

You can paste it here as CSV or JSON, or share details such as:
- Column names
- Sample rows
- Known issues to fix, e.g. duplicate employees, inconsistent date formats, missing emails, inconsistent department names
- Desired output format: CSV, JSON, or summary only

Once you send the dataset, I’ll clean and normalize it, then summarize the results.

content.name: DataTransformerAgent
content.description: Transform and clean datasets for analytics

messages.content: Clean and normalize the employee dataset, then summarize the results

content.delta:
Please provide the employee dataset you want cleaned and normalized.

You can paste it here as CSV or JSON, for example:

```csv
employee_id,name,email,department,salary,start_date
1, Jane Smith ,JANE.SMITH@EXAMPLE.COM, Sales ,75000,01/15/2022
```

Once you send it, I’ll clean and normalize it, then summarize the results.

messages.content: Clean and normalize the employee dataset, then summarize the results

content.name: DataTransformerAgent
content.description: Transform and clean datasets for analytics

content.delta:
Please provide the employee dataset you want cleaned and normalized, preferably as CSV or JSON.

You can paste it here, for example:

```csv
employee_id,name,email,department,start_date,salary
1, Jane Doe ,JANE.DOE@EXAMPLE.COM, sales,01/15/2022,"$65,000"
```

Once you send it, I’ll clean/normalize it and summarize the results.
